chunks.text: HP Names Yoky Matsuoka to Board of Directors - EECS at Berkeley 2014 CS Distinguished Alumna, Yoky Matsuoka (B.S. ’93), has been appointed to the Board of Directors of HP Inc. Matsuoka was the founder of Google[x], the company’s innovative research and development lab, before serving as CTO of Google Alphabet’s Nest business. She was also a senior executive at Apple and an endowed professor at Carnegie Mellon University and the University of Washington. The HP Board of Directors is said to be one of the most diverse of any technology company in the U.S. Categories Alumni Honors Industry View Open Faculty Positions
